name: Cinnamon-Apple Angel Food Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons apple juice, or apple cider
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat egg whites, cream of tartar, and salt on medium speed until soft peaks form.
2. Add sugar 2 T. at a time, beating well after each addition; beat until smooth and glossy and stiff peaks form.
3. Add extracts on low speed.
4. Combine confectioner's sugar and flour; gently fold into egg mixture.
5. Pour batter into an ungreased 10 inch tube pan.
6. Bake on the lowest rack at 375°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the top crust is golden brown and cracks feel dry.
7. Immediately invert cake in pan to cool completely.
8. Loosen sides of cake from pan and remove.
9. For glaze, melt butter in a saucepan. Stir in confectioner's sugar and cinnamon.
10. Add apple juice slowly until glaze is thin enough to drizzle.
11. Drizzle over cake.
